item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Scholar's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned scholar─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level scholar to 70 and complete all job quests up through “Our Unsung Heroes.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
